Chronology of every recorded fact about [[parasite ring]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — A parasite ring is a braided halfsilver ring etched with intricate script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — A parasite ring slows the cycling process, making it more difficult but also more rewarding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The parasite ring is held by the Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The parasite ring burdens cycling but results in twice the reward, helping to build up pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — The parasite ring is an artifact that Lindon carries on his person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The parasite ring will eventually help Lindon overcome his deficiencies.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The parasite ring was stolen from the Heaven’s Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — The parasite ring makes cycling twice as hard but strengthens the spirit twice as fast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon uses a parasite ring to cycle madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has a parasite ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan instructs Lindon to wear his parasite ring.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon possesses a parasite ring that he is advised not to wear while practicing the technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The parasite ring weighs down Lindon's spirit.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon requested a parasite ring.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long's training spear is scripted to be similar to a parasite ring.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
